name: copybridge
description: Universal Clipboard for Mac and Windows — local-first prototype.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/clipboardPayload.js && node --check src/rememberedPeers.js && node --check src/secureTransport.js && node --check src/trustedPeers.js && node --check src/renderer/renderer.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:secure && npm run test:trusted && npm run test:image && npm run test:remembered && npm run test:network

author: Pavel Blinov
